prompts.name: airod_analyst_prompt
prompts.description: AIROD Analyst prompt. Provides structured guidance for analyzing outage/incident data leveraging injected database schema.

prompts.name: customer_insights_prompt
prompts.description: Customer Insights prompt. Tailored instructions to derive customer impact and sentiment summaries from outage datasets.

prompts.name: entity_extractor_prompt
prompts.description: Entity Extractor prompt. Guides extraction of entities (service, offering, region, incident IDs) from free-form natural language input.

prompts.name: outage_analyst_prompt
prompts.description: Outage Analyst prompt. Focused instructions for performing outage root cause and impact analysis with consistent structure.

prompts.name: outage_context
prompts.description: Outage context prompt. Supplies shared outage domain context that other prompts/tools can reference.

prompts.name: airo_context
prompts.description: AIRO outage analytics context prompt. Supplies shared AIRO outage analytics domain context used by multiple tools/agents.

prompts.name: planner_prompt
prompts.description: Planner prompt. Provides step-wise reasoning and planning template to decompose user asks into tool/resource usage.

prompts.name: summary_formatter_prompt
prompts.description: Summary Formatter prompt. Supplies formatting instructions to convert raw analytic output into concise human-readable summaries.

prompts.name: unified_visualization_prompt
prompts.description: Unified Visualization prompt. Directs generation of a structured visualization specification (tables/charts) from analysis context.

prompts.name: sql_query_prompt
prompts.description: SQL Query Agent prompt. Provides instructions and context for generating safe, read-only SQL queries against the outage analytics schema.

prompts.name: auto_outage_prompt
prompts.description: Autonomous Agent — Outage domain SQL analyst. Generates T-SQL queries for outage/incident analysis (severity, TTM, CritSit, RCA, communications).

prompts.name: auto_airo_prompt
prompts.description: Autonomous Agent — AIRO/AIROD domain SQL analyst. Generates T-SQL queries for AIRO impact metrics at offering, region, and customer granularity.

prompts.name: auto_customer_prompt
prompts.description: Autonomous Agent — Customer insights domain SQL analyst. Generates T-SQL queries for customer-level CritSit, AIRO, QEI, and communication gap analysis.

prompts.name: auto_entity_extractor_prompt
prompts.description: Autonomous Agent — Entity extraction analyst. Extracts and normalizes entities (offerings, regions, services, customers) from user text.

prompts.name: auto_summary_prompt
prompts.description: Autonomous Agent — Summary formatter. Synthesizes multi-domain analysis results into a polished consolidated narrative.

prompts.name: auto_visualization_prompt
prompts.description: Autonomous Agent — Visualization analyst. Selects high-value visuals from datasets and emits Streamlit code.
